zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mainwaring於1460年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Randall Mainwaring III20歲，母親Margaret Davenport22歲。她於大約1477年與Randall Grosvenor I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1510年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾貝拉阿波特享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Mainwaring于1460年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲Randall Mainwaring III20岁，母亲Margaret Davenport22岁。她于大约1477年与Randall Grosvenor I结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1510年在英国英格兰史洛普爾貝拉阿波特享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mainwaring was born in 1460, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Randall Mainwaring III, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Davenport, was 22. She married Randall Grosvenor I about 1477. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1510, in Bellaport, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mainwaring est née en 1460, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Randall Mainwaring III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Davenport, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Randall Grosvenor I environ 1477. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1510, à Bellaport, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Mainwaring 1460 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Randall Mainwaring III 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Davenport 22. Sie hat um 1477 Randall Grosvenor I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1510 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Bellaport, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mainwaring è nata il nel 1460 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Randall Mainwaring III, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Davenport, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Randall Grosvenor I circa 1477. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1510, nel Bellaport, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Mainwaringが1460年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Randall Mainwaring IIIは20歳，母Margaret Davenportは22歳であった。約1477年にRandall Grosvenor Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1510年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアベラポルトで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mainwaring(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Randall Mainwaring III(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Davenport(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1477년 Randall Grosvenor I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 벨라포트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Mainwaring nasceu em 1460, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Randall Mainwaring III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Davenport, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Randall Grosvenor I aproximadamente 1477. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1510, em Bellaport, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mainwaring родилась в 1460 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Randall Mainwaring III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Davenport, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randall Grosvenor I около 1477 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1510 г. в местности беллапорт, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Mainwaring nació en 1460, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Randall Mainwaring III, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Davenport, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Randall Grosvenor I aproximadamente 1477. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1510, en Bellaport, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
